human_verification.method: manual spec-pack review plus local repository validation

Current package task baseline from virtualization-specialist

promotion_criteria: sustained usage volume proves retained implementation materially improves cost, latency, reliability, or support outcomes
generated implementation passes the same scenario suite, functionality map, research summary, and no-regression policy
source refresh, tenant evidence retrieval, logging, redaction, rollback, and boundary enforcement are tested in target runtime
human maintainer records separate trusted-build promotion approval

notes: Manifest and evidence define a VM-centered virtualization specialist with explicit platform-fit, sizing, migration, resilience, troubleshooting, implementation-guidance, and boundary behavior.

Scenario coverage includes decision matrices, resilience and migration outputs, runbook-style troubleshooting, validation checklists, tenant-specific adaptation, source conflicts, out-of-scope refusal, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence escalation, and no unreviewed regressions.
The package is validated as a spec pack. It does not claim retained implementation ownership.
